subjects.description: white and orange tabby cat darting through a dense garden path
subjects.appearance_details: short-haired tabby with white chest and paws, orange patches, bright wide eyes, alert ears, and warm daylight on its fur
subjects.relationship: primary animal subject being followed closely by the camera
subjects.location: narrow ground-level path between branches, flowers, leaves, and garden plants
subjects.relative_size: small cat filling much of the low foreground, surrounded by taller plants
subjects.orientation: moving forward along the path while scanning side to side
subjects.pose: low agile jog with paws stepping lightly and tail balancing turns
subjects.action: darts happily through the garden as if chasing something unseen
subjects.state_changes: eyes track moving leaves; body shifts around plants; orange fur catches scattered sunlight
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: white and orange tabby fur, sharp whiskers, soft coat texture, and warm highlighted patches
subjects.facial_features: bright eyes, pink nose, long whiskers, pointed ears, and alert forward gaze

background_setting: A dense garden corridor with overlapping branches, flowers, leaves, narrow soil path, and warm scattered daylight filtering from above.

lighting.conditions: Dappled daylight through leaves, warm highlights on orange fur, soft shadows under plants, and high contrast patches along the path.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Dappled daylight through leaves, warm highlights on orange fur, soft shadows under plants, and high contrast patches along the path.

aesthetics.composition: Cinematic warm tones, intimate low perspective, shallow focus, grainy texture, and clear sharp subject detail within lush greenery.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Cinematic warm tones, intimate low perspective, shallow focus, grainy texture, and clear sharp subject detail within lush greenery.

cinematography.camera_motion: Ground-level close tracking shot following the cat from just ahead and beside it, shallow depth of field with blurred plants passing near lens.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Warm grainy garden realism with intimate handheld energy and natural color contrast.
context: A curious tabby cat moves through a crowded garden path, chasing or investigating something hidden among the plants.

actions.description: The tabby cat enters the narrow garden path at a quick happy jog, eyes wide and ears alert.
It darts between flowers and leaves, scanning branches while the low camera follows close to the ground.
The cat pushes past foreground leaves and continues forward, orange fur glowing in scattered sunlight.

segments.description: Introduce the cat from a low path-level view as it begins moving through dense garden plants.
segments.key_changes: cat enters frame; leaves part around path; dappled highlights appear on fur
segments.camera: ground-level tracking with shallow depth of field

segments.description: Follow the cat closely as it jogs, scans branches, and navigates the narrow corridor.
segments.key_changes: head turns side to side; plants blur past lens; tail balances the motion
segments.camera: close handheld follow beside the cat

segments.description: Keep the cat sharp as warm light catches its orange patches and it disappears deeper into the garden.
segments.key_changes: foreground leaves sweep by; cat advances beyond midground; warm contrast increases
segments.camera: low forward tracking with soft plant occlusion

temporal_caption: A white and orange tabby cat happily darts along a narrow garden path, scanning leaves and flowers from a low cinematic angle.
audio_description: Soft paw steps on soil, brushing leaves, faint garden insects, distant birds, and quiet excited cat breathing.
